title: Dutch HNWI Signal Engine Input
description: AFM-only liquidity signal review engine with optional Exa shortlist confirmation.

runExaConfirmation.title: Run Exa shortlist confirmation
runExaConfirmation.description: Use Exa only on shortlisted review records.

afmMar19CsvUrl.title: AFM MAR 19 CSV URL
afmMar19CsvUrl.description: Optional override for AFM MAR 19 CSV source.

afmSubstantialHoldingsCsvUrl.title: AFM Substantial Holdings CSV URL
afmSubstantialHoldingsCsvUrl.description: Optional override for AFM substantial holdings CSV source.

lookbackDays.title: Lookback days
lookbackDays.description: How far back to consider signals.

maxReviewRecords.title: Max review records
maxReviewRecords.description: Maximum number of review records to export.

maxMatchReadyRecords.title: Max match-ready records
maxMatchReadyRecords.description: Maximum number of match-ready records to export.

topBucketBForExa.title: Top bucket B records for Exa
topBucketBForExa.description: How many bucket B records to send through shortlist confirmation.
